summary: Comprehensive testing of Centralized Inventory System architectural redesign. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). The system correctly implements: single source of truth (central_stock), audit trail (stock_movements), stock availability checks before sales, and proper stock deduction/restoration for sales/returns/cancellations.
passed_tests: GET /api/inventory/central/stock - Get stock for specific variant
GET /api/inventory/central/all - Get all centralized stock records
POST /api/inventory/central/deduct - FAIL if insufficient stock (400 error)
POST /api/inventory/central/transfer - Fail if source has insufficient stock
GET /api/inventory/central/movements - Get stock movement history (audit trail)
POST /api/inventory/central/migrate - Migrate existing stock to centralized system
POST /api/sales - Create sale deducts stock via centralized service
POST /api/sales - Sale FAILS if insufficient stock (400 error)
PUT /api/sales/{sale_id}/cancel - Cancel sale restores stock via centralized service
POST /api/sales-returns - Sales return adds stock back via centralized service
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: InventoryService class properly encapsulates all stock operations
GOOD: Atomic operations using MongoDB find_one_and_update with $inc
GOOD: Stock availability check before sales prevents overselling
GOOD: Audit trail (stock_movements) logs all stock changes with movement_type, reference_id, and performed_by
GOOD: Multi-warehouse support via warehouse_id field
GOOD: Backward compatibility maintained with legacy inventory table updates
NOTE: Stock is warehouse-specific - sales check stock in the specific store_id/warehouse_id
seed_data_creation: Tests create stock in dedicated test warehouses (sales-test-store, returns-test-store) to avoid conflicts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Centralized Inventory System fully implemented and tested. Key collections: central_stock (single source of truth), stock_movements (audit trail). All stock operations go through InventoryService class. Stock is warehouse-specific - when creating sales, ensure stock exists in the specific store_id. Movement types: SALE, PURCHASE, RETURN, ADJUSTMENT, TRANSFER, INITIAL, CORRECTION.

central_stock_table.description: Single source of truth for all stock levels

stock_movements_audit.description: Complete audit trail of all stock changes

stock_availability_check.description: Sales fail with 400 error if insufficient stock

sale_stock_deduction.description: Stock automatically deducted when sale is created

cancel_sale_stock_restore.description: Stock automatically restored when sale is cancelled

sales_return_stock_restore.description: Stock automatically added back for sales returns
